name: Sales Office
description: A regional or country-level commercial presence for customer coverage, distribution management, partner development, executive relationships, and demand sensing.
best_fit_conditions: High customer concentration or regional headquarters density
Need for faster account coverage across automotive, industrial, communications, and consumer semiconductor customers
Market is strategically important but does not yet justify manufacturing capex
key_risks: Limited strategic value if not tied to named account ownership
Can become symbolic without field-application engineering and senior relationship coverage
May duplicate existing Taiwan or Singapore coverage if scope is unclear

name: Foundry
description: Wafer fabrication footprint for mature and specialty process nodes, potentially serving automotive, industrial, display, power management, IoT, and communications customers.
best_fit_conditions: Reliable power, water, land, logistics, and environmental permitting
Long-term subsidy support and clear government execution capacity
Anchor customer commitments or strategic supply-chain resilience requirements
Availability of process, equipment, facilities, and operations talent
key_risks: Large upfront capex and long payback period
Utilities, water, and ESG constraints can delay ramp-up
Talent shortages can raise cost and yield risk

name: Advanced Packaging
description: Back-end integration activities such as advanced assembly, test, system-in-package, fan-out, 2.5D/3D integration support, and chiplet-adjacent ecosystem participation.
best_fit_conditions: Existing OSAT, substrate, equipment, and back-end supplier ecosystem
Customer demand for higher-value mature-node integration
Ability to partner before committing to full owned capacity
Strong engineering workforce and reliable logistics
key_risks: Technology roadmap can shift quickly toward more advanced process integration
Margins depend on customer mix, yield, and equipment utilization
Competition from established OSAT providers may limit differentiation
Requires careful IP, quality, and customer qualification management

name: Customer Support Center
description: Regional support operation for technical triage, customer service, logistics coordination, order support, documentation, and field-application engineering handoff.
best_fit_conditions: Large multilingual or English-language service talent pool
Competitive operating cost and strong business process discipline
Need for regional timezone coverage and faster customer response
Clear integration with sales, field engineering, and supply-chain teams
key_risks: Low value if limited to generic call handling without technical escalation
Quality risk if training, knowledge management, and escalation paths are weak
Sensitive customer issues still require direct engineering ownership
